Winamax Poker - Tournament "Expresso" buyIn: 0.93€ + 0.07€ level: 1 - HandId: #1049936791668260865-3-1533236800 - Holdem no limit (10/20) - 2018/08/02 19:06:40 UTC
Table: 'Expresso(244457459)#0' 3-max (real money) Seat #1 is the button
Seat 1: chispalyly (500)
Seat 2: Erj junior (510)
Seat 3: mzane42 (490)
*** ANTE/BLINDS ***
Erj junior posts small blind 10
mzane42 posts big blind 20
Dealt to mzane42 [Ac 4s]
*** PRE-FLOP *** 
chispalyly calls 20
Erj junior raises 490 to 510 and is all-in
mzane42 calls 470 and is all-in
chispalyly folds
*** FLOP *** [5h Ah 7d]
*** TURN *** [5h Ah 7d][2d]
*** RIVER *** [5h Ah 7d 2d][5s]
*** SHOW DOWN ***
Erj junior shows [Ks Kd] (Two pairs : Kings and 5)
mzane42 shows [Ac 4s] (Two pairs : Aces and 5)
mzane42 collected 1000 from main pot
Erj junior collected 20 from side pot 1
*** SUMMARY ***
Total pot 1020 | No rake
Board: [5h Ah 7d 2d 5s]
Seat 2: Erj junior (small blind) showed [Ks Kd] and won 20 with Two pairs : Kings and 5
Seat 3: mzane42 (big blind) showed [Ac 4s] and won 1000 with Two pairs : Aces and 5

Table: 'Expresso(244457459)#0' 3-max (real money) Seat #2 is the button
Seat 1: chispalyly (480)
Seat 2: Erj junior (20)
Seat 3: mzane42 (1000)
*** ANTE/BLINDS ***
mzane42 posts small blind 10
chispalyly posts big blind 20
Dealt to mzane42 [5c Js]
*** PRE-FLOP *** 
Erj junior calls 20 and is all-in
mzane42 calls 10
chispalyly checks
*** FLOP *** [Qc 3c 7d]
mzane42 checks
chispalyly checks
*** TURN *** [Qc 3c 7d][Th]
mzane42 bets 20
chispalyly calls 20
*** RIVER *** [Qc 3c 7d Th][4h]
mzane42 checks
chispalyly checks
*** SHOW DOWN ***
chispalyly shows [2d 6d] (High card : Queen)
Erj junior shows [6h 2c] (High card : Queen)
mzane42 shows [5c Js] (High card : Queen)
mzane42 collected 100 from pot
*** SUMMARY ***
Total pot 100 | No rake
Board: [Qc 3c 7d Th 4h]
Seat 1: chispalyly (big blind) showed [2d 6d] and lost with High card : Queen
Seat 2: Erj junior (button) showed [6h 2c] and lost with High card : Queen
Seat 3: mzane42 (small blind) showed [5c Js] and won 100 with High card : Queen

Winamax Poker - Tournament "Expresso" buyIn: 0.93€ + 0.07€ level: 1 - HandId: #1049936791668260865-10-1533236919 - Holdem no limit (10/20) - 2018/08/02 19:08:39 UTC
Table: 'Expresso(244457459)#0' 3-max (real money) Seat #3 is the button
Seat 1: chispalyly (400)
Seat 3: mzane42 (1100)
*** ANTE/BLINDS ***
mzane42 posts small blind 10
chispalyly posts big blind 20
Dealt to mzane42 [Ac 8s]
*** PRE-FLOP *** 
mzane42 raises 20 to 40
chispalyly calls 20
*** FLOP *** [8d 3d 5c]
chispalyly checks
mzane42 bets 70
chispalyly calls 70
*** TURN *** [8d 3d 5c][2s]
chispalyly bets 50
mzane42 raises 100 to 150
chispalyly calls 100
*** RIVER *** [8d 3d 5c 2s][Ts]
chispalyly bets 140 and is all-in
mzane42 calls 140
*** SHOW DOWN ***
chispalyly shows [5d 9s] (One pair : 5)
mzane42 shows [Ac 8s] (One pair : 8)
mzane42 collected 800 from pot
*** SUMMARY ***
Total pot 800 | No rake
Board: [8d 3d 5c 2s Ts]
Seat 1: chispalyly (big blind) showed [5d 9s] and lost with One pair : 5
Seat 3: mzane42 (small blind) (button) showed [Ac 8s] and won 800 with One pair : 8
